# Request for Comments (RFC) Template

## Summary

Brief description of the proposed change or feature.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Detailed Design

### Proposed Solution

Detailed explanation of the implementation.

### API Changes

```swift
// Example of new or changed API
public protocol NewProtocol {
    func newMethod() async
}
```

### Alternatives Considered

What other approaches were considered and why were they rejected?

## Impact

- Breaking changes: Yes/No
- Migration path: Describe if breaking
- Performance impact: Expected impact

## Testing Strategy

How will this be tested?

## Timeline

Expected implementation timeframe.

## Open Questions

Questions for reviewers to consider.
